name: Adrenaline
description: You've been through a lot, but when the Exit Gates are powered, you are overcome with a rush of Adrenaline. You instantly heal one Health State and break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for 5 seconds. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds. This perk is on cooldown while Exhausted.

name: Lithe
description: After performing a rushed vault, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for 3 seconds. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds. This perk is on cooldown while Exhausted.

name: Dead Hard
description: When Injured, activate Dead Hard to become invulnerable for 0.5 seconds and dash forward. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds. This perk is on cooldown while Exhausted.

name: Sprint Burst
description: When starting to run, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for 3 seconds. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds. This perk is on cooldown while Exhausted.

name: Urban Evasion
description: Years of evading people that were after you have made you a natural. Increases your Crouching Movement speed by 90/95/100% of your normal Crouching Movement speed.

name: Self-Care
description: You have developed the skill to treat yourself. Grants the ability to self-heal without a Med-Kit at 50% of the normal Healing speed. Increases the efficiency of Med-Kit self-healing by 10/15/20%.

name: Borrowed Time
description: When unhooking a Survivor within the Killer's Terror Radius, the Unhooked Survivor benefits from the Endurance Status Effect for 6/8/10 seconds. The duration of the Endurance Effect is doubled when the Exit Gates are powered.

name: Decisive Strike
description: After being Unhooked or Unhooking yourself, Decisive Strike activates for 40/50/60 seconds. While active, succeed in a Skill Check when grabbed by the Killer to stun them for 5 seconds and escape their grasp.

name: Spine Chill
description: You have a preternatural ability to sense danger. A distant stare sets your teeth on edge. Your Terror Radius detection range is increased by 12 metres. Increases your Vaulting speed by 2/4/6% when the Killer is looking in your direction within 36 metres.

name: Resilience
description: You are motivated in dire situations. While in the Injured State, gain a 3/6/9% speed bonus to all actions that can be interrupted.

name: We'll Make It
description: The sight of a crying friend in need fills you with the energy to save them. After unhooking a Survivor, gain a 100% speed bonus to Healing for 60/90/120 seconds.

name: Kindred
description: When you are on the Hook, all Survivors' Auras are revealed to each other. If the Killer is within 8/12/16 metres of your Hook, the Killer's Aura is also revealed to all Survivors.

name: Alert
description: Your acute senses are on high alert. When the Killer breaks a Pallet or Breakable Wall, or damages a Generator, their Aura is revealed to you for 4/5/6 seconds.

name: Balanced Landing
description: Whenever you fall from a great height, your movement is not hindered. Reduces the time to stagger after falling by 75%. Decreases Noise Notification distance by 50% for 3 seconds after landing. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds. This perk is on cooldown while Exhausted.

name: Unbreakable
description: Once per trial, you can fully recover from the Dying State. Increases your Recovery speed by 25/30/35%.

name: No Mither
description: The will to fight is all you have. You start the trial in the Injured State. Your grunts of pain are completely suppressed. Grants the ability to self-recover from the Dying State. The Recovery speed bonus is 20/25/30%. You can fully recover from the Dying State.

name: Deliverance
description: After unhooking a Survivor, gain the ability to unhook yourself. The self-unhook has a 50% chance of success. If it fails, a random skill check will trigger. Causes the Broken Status Effect for 100/80/60 seconds after unhooking yourself.

name: Flip-Flop
description: While in the Dying State, converts up to 40/45/50% of Dying State recovery progression into Hook escape progression after being picked up by the Killer.

name: Overcome
description: Overcome the limits of your body to escape a threat. When Injured, at the cost of Bleeding and leaving Scratch Marks, break into a sprint at 150% of your normal Running Movement speed for 5 seconds. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60/50/40 seconds.

name: Lucky Break
description: While Injured, Lucky Break activates. Scratch Marks and Bleeding are suppressed for 40/50/60 seconds. The effect ends when you are healed.

name: Poised
description: When a Generator is completed, you leave no Scratch Marks for the next 6/8/10 seconds.

name: Trail of Torment
description: After completing 70% of the repair progress on a Generator, it triggers a loud noise notification on the Entity's side. After fully repairing a Generator, leave scratch marks for 10/8/6 seconds.

name: Object of Obsession
description: Your acute senses allow you to perceive and be perceived by others. Whenever the Killer reads your Aura, their Aura is revealed to you for 3/4/5 seconds. This perk causes a connection between you and the Killer. You are revealed to the Killer for 5/4/3 seconds whenever you look at the Killer in a 45-degree angle.

name: Premonition
description: A chill runs down your spine when facing a dangerous direction. You receive a visual warning when looking at the Killer within a range of 12 metres. The warning is given 3/4/5 seconds early.

name: Calm Spirit
description: Animals seem to trust you. Suppresses Screaming. The odds of triggering a Loud Noise Notification when entering a Locker are reduced by 70/80/90%.

name: Iron Will
description: Your time on the run has taught you to fight through the pain. Grunts of Pain caused by Injuries are reduced by 50/75/100%.

name: Fixated
description: You have a steady pace and know when your steps are loud. Grants the ability to see your own Scratch Marks. Increases your normal and crouching Movement speed by 5% while not injured.

name: Streetwise
description: Those who live on the streets have learned tricks to stretch their supplies. Reduces the Depletion rate of Items you and Allies hold by 15/20/25% while within 8 metres of each other.

name: Saboteur
description: Unlocks the Sabotage action on Hook without a Toolbox. The Sabotage action is 10/15/20% faster. Sabotaged Hooks take 20% longer to regenerate.

name: Breakdown
description: When Unhooked or Unhooking yourself, the hook is destroyed. The Killer receives a 6/8/10% penalty to their Movement speed for 3 seconds. Has no effect on Scourge Hooks or the Basement Hooks.

name: Solidarity
description: You fight for those who cannot fight for themselves. When you heal another Survivor without a Med-Kit, a fraction of the healing progress is also applied to your own healing. This perk only activates when you are Injured.

name: Babysitter
description: You protect those who cannot protect themselves. After unhooking a Survivor, their Scratch Marks and Bleeding do not appear for 4/6/8 seconds. You also leave no Scratch Marks for 4/6/8 seconds.

name: Pharmacy
description: Your medical training allows you to better organise a medical supplies search. Unlocks the ability to rummage through a Chest a second time. The first Chest you open is guaranteed to contain a Med-Kit of any Rarity.

name: Head On
description: You are good under pressure. While hiding inside a Locker for 3 seconds, Head On activates. Activating Head On stuns the Killer for 3 seconds.

name: Quick & Quiet
description: You do not make as much noise as others when quickly vaulting over obstacles or hiding in Lockers. Reduces the noise made during fast vaults and fast Locker entries by 100%. Reduces the Volume of any Sounds when hiding in a Locker by 100%.

name: Windows of Opportunity
description: The vaults and Pallets in your surroundings are highlighted. Windows of Opportunity lasts for 8/12/16 seconds after leaving a chase.

name: Diversion
description: After standing within a 2-metre radius for 15/14/13 seconds while crouching and motionless, Diversion activates. Activating Diversion throws a stone to a targeted location up to 12 metres away, causing a Noise Notification. Diversion deactivates after use.

name: Second Wind
description: After being Unhooked, Second Wind activates. While active, heal yourself by healing 50/75/100% of a Scratch Mark when vaulting.

name: For the People
description: You put the health of others before yourself. When another Survivor is injured, For the People activates. When active, performing a Healing action on the injured Survivor automatically completes the healing action. This transfers your Healthy State to the Survivor you healed, setting you to an Injured State.

name: Up the Ante
description: Luck is on your side. For each Survivor that is still alive, gain a 1/1.5/2% bonus to Luck. Luck affects the Chances of unhooking yourself or freeing yourself from Bear Traps.

name: Off the Record
description: When you are Unhooked or unhook yourself, Off the Record activates for 60/70/80 seconds. While active, your Aura is not revealed to the Killer and you benefit from the Endurance Status Effect. Off the Record deactivates when you complete a Generator or when you take a Protection Hit.

name: Boon: Circle of Healing
description: You bless a Totem and create a Boon Totem within 24 metres. Any Survivor in the Boon Totem's range benefits from a 50/75/100% Healing speed increase and the ability to self-heal without a Med-Kit at normal speed.

name: Boon: Shadow Step
description: You bless a Totem and create a Boon Totem within 24 metres. Any Survivor in the Boon Totem's range has their Scratch Marks and Aura suppressed.

name: Boon: Exponential
description: You bless a Totem and create a Boon Totem within 24 metres. Any Survivor in the Boon Totem's range benefits from a 50/75/100% Recovery speed increase and can fully recover from the Dying State.

name: Prove Thyself
description: Work together, Survive together. For each other Survivor within 4 metres, gain a 10/12/15% repair speed. Grants 50% more Bloodpoints for cooperative actions.

name: Bond
description: Your bond with your teammates allows you to feel their pain. Whenever a Survivor is within 36 metres of you, their Aura is revealed to you.

name: Situational Awareness
description: You guide your teammates by sharing information. Each time you complete 15% worth of Repair Progress on a Generator, all other Survivors within 12/16/20 metres of you have their Auras revealed to you for 3 seconds.

name: Rookie Spirit
description: You are an active learner and pay attention to the finest details. The Repair Progression of all Generators is revealed to you at all times.

name: Hope
description: You will not be kept down. After the Exit Gates are powered, gain a 7% speed bonus to your Movement speed for 120/150/180 seconds.

name: Left Behind
description: You are a lone wolf who has had to fend for themselves. After the Exit Gate is opened, the Hatch's Aura is revealed to you within 32/64/unlimited metres.

name: Small Game
description: You have an uncanny ability to sense danger. You get a Sixth Sense for Traps. When in a 4/5/6-metre radius of a Trap, a small notification will appear.

name: Appraisal
description: You have a sharp eye and can spot things others miss. While in a 4-metre radius of a Chest, the Chest becomes Highlighted. Upon rummaging through a Chest, obtain 3 additional Tokens. Each Token can be used to rummage through an additional Chest once. You may still only rummage through each Chest once.

name: Blood Pact
description: You and the Obsession are bound together. While injured, if the Obsession is within 16 metres of you, both of you benefit from a 7% Haste Status Effect for 2 seconds each time a Generator is repaired.

name: Inner Strength
description: Heal yourself by hiding in a Locker for 10/8/6 seconds after cleansing a Dull or Hex Totem.

name: Botany Knowledge
description: Your mastery of healing increases efficiency. Healing speed is increased by 30/40/50%. Med-Kit efficiency is decreased by 20%.

name: Aftercare
description: You know how to keep in touch and work together as a team. After performing a Conspicuous Action for the first time in a trial, you see the Auras of all Survivors who have also performed a Conspicuous Action. You also see their Auras for 6/8/10 seconds after they perform a Conspicuous Action.

name: Any Means Necessary
description: You have developed a sense for last-second opportunities. After a Pallet is thrown down while you are within 14 metres, stand next to the Pallet and hold the Ability Button to reset the Pallet after 14/12/10 seconds.

name: Wake Up!
description: Your time to shine has come. When all Generators are repaired, the Opening speed of Exit Gates is increased by 15/20/25% and your Aura is revealed to other Survivors.

name: Visionary
description: Completing Generators is your way out. While repairing a Generator within 4 metres of another Survivor, gain 10/15/20% repair speed. Alert: other Survivors repairing the same Generator have their Aura briefly revealed to you.

name: Desperate Measures
description: You fight with everything you have. For each injured, hooked, or Dead Survivor, Healing and Unhook speeds are increased by 10/12/14%, up to a maximum of 40/48/56%.

name: Plot Twist
description: You've lived through enough bad endings to be ready for the next one. Crouching motionless for 2 seconds lets you quietly drop to the Dying State. You then immediately begin to recover, and recover fully 3/2/1% faster. After recovering, sprint at 150% your normal speed for 3 seconds. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 40/35/30 seconds.

name: Scene Partner
description: Your emotion is raw and powerful enough to attract attention. When a Killer enters your Terror Radius, there is a chance to trigger a Scream. If you do, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for 5/6/7 seconds.

name: Shoulder the Burden
description: Sharing the load helps others endure. When a Survivor is put into the Dying State within 16 metres of you, press the Active Ability button to take one of their Hook States. Both you and the rescued Survivor are put into the Endurance Status Effect for 6/8/10 seconds.

name: Power Struggle
description: You will not be held hostage. While being carried by the Killer, gain a 2% Wiggle progress boost for every 1% of your Wiggle progress. Once the power of a dropped Pallet is within 4 metres of you, Power Struggle activates. When active, escape the Killer's grasp by snapping free to stun the Killer for 3 seconds using the dropped Pallet.
